component.name: WebsitePiPGroup
component.script:
sub init() print "WebsitePiPGroup: init()" m.urlLabel = m.top.findNode("urlLabel") m.titleLabel = m.top.findNode("pipTitle") m.blinkTimer = m.top.findNode("blinkTimer") m.miniView = m.top.findNode("miniView") m.zoomView = m.top.findNode("zoomView") m.zoomTitle = m.top.findNode("zoomTitle") m.zoomUrl = m.top.findNode("zoomUrl") m.zoomHints = m.top.findNode("zoomHints") m.hotspotRoot = m.top.findNode("hotspotRoot") m.cursor = m.top.findNode("cursor")
m.blinkTimer.observeField("fire", "onBlink") m.blinkTimer.control = "start" m.blinkState = false m.sections = [] m.hotspotIdx = 0 m.zoomed = false end sub
' = Data =
sub onPageUrlChange(event as Object) url = event.getData() display = url if len(url) > 38 then display = left(url, 35) + "..." m.urlLabel.text = "[WEB] " + display m.zoomUrl.text = url end sub
sub onPageTitleChange(event as Object) t = event.getData() if len(t) > 32 then t = left(t, 29) + "..." m.titleLabel.text = t m.zoomTitle.text = event.getData() end sub
sub onSectionsChange(event as Object) raw = event.getData() if raw = "" then return parsed = ParseJson(raw) if type(parsed) <> "roArray" then return m.sections = parsed m.hotspotIdx = 0 if m.zoomed then btvBuildHotspots() end sub
' = Zoom toggle =
sub onZoomedChange(event as Object) m.zoomed = event.getData() m.miniView.visible = not m.zoomed m.zoomView.visible = m.zoomed if m.zoomed btvBuildHotspots() btvMoveCursor() end if end sub
' Build section hotspot rectangles in the zoom view ' Distributes sections evenly down a fake "page" at 880x480 content area sub btvBuildHotspots() ' Clear existing hotspots while m.hotspotRoot.getChildCount() > 0 m.hotspotRoot.removeChildIndex(0) end while
count = m.sections.count() if count = 0 then return
' Fake page is 860px wide, 460px tall ' Stack section blocks with even spacing slotH = 460 \ count if slotH > 80 then slotH = 80 if slotH < 28 then slotH = 28 padding = 4
i = 0 while i < count sec = m.sections[i] yPos = 10 + (i * (slotH + padding))
' Section block background bg = CreateObject("roSGNode", "Rectangle") bg.translation = [10, yPos] bg.width = 840 bg.height = slotH bg.color = "0x1A1A3AFF" m.hotspotRoot.appendChild(bg)
' Heading label lbl = CreateObject("roSGNode", "Label") lbl.translation = [18, yPos + 4] lbl.width = 820 lbl.height = slotH - 8 heading = sec.heading if len(heading) > 72 then heading = left(heading, 69) + "..." lbl.text = "[" + mid(stri(i + 1), 2) + "] " + heading lbl.color = "0xA0A0D0FF" lbl.wrap = true m.hotspotRoot.appendChild(lbl)
i = i + 1 end while end sub
' Move the cursor highlight to current hotspotIdx sub btvMoveCursor() count = m.sections.count() if count = 0 then return slotH = 460 \ count if slotH > 80 then slotH = 80 if slotH < 28 then slotH = 28 padding = 4 yPos = 10 + (m.hotspotIdx * (slotH + padding)) m.cursor.translation = [8, yPos] m.cursor.height = slotH end sub
' = Navigation in zoom mode =
function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if press = false then return false if not m.zoomed then return false
count = m.sections.count() if count = 0 then return false
if key = "up" if m.hotspotIdx > 0 m.hotspotIdx = m.hotspotIdx - 1 btvMoveCursor() end if return true else if key = "down" if m.hotspotIdx < count - 1 m.hotspotIdx = m.hotspotIdx + 1 btvMoveCursor() end if return true else if key = "OK" m.top.selectedSection = m.hotspotIdx return true else if key = "right" ' Signal scene to cycle focus forward m.top.requestFocusRight = not m.top.requestFocusRight return true else if key = "left" ' Signal scene to cycle focus backward m.top.requestFocusLeft = not m.top.requestFocusLeft return true end if return false end function
' = Blink animation (mini mode only) =
sub onBlink(event as Object) if m.zoomed then return m.blinkState = not m.blinkState op = 0.5 if m.blinkState then op = 1.0 h1 = m.top.findNode("hotspot1") h2 = m.top.findNode("hotspot2") h3 = m.top.findNode("hotspot3") if type(h1) <> "roInvalid" then h1.opacity = op if type(h2) <> "roInvalid" then h2.opacity = op * 0.7 if type(h3) <> "roInvalid" then h3.opacity = op * 0.9 end sub

Label.text: Up/Down: navigate sections | OK: select | Left/Right: change panel
